name: Cornbread Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large pot over medium heat on the stove.
2. Add the onion and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Add the celery and continue to cook, stirring occasionally, for another 10 minutes. Remove from the heat and pour into a mixing bowl.
4. Add the cornmeal, broth, salt, pepper, thyme, sage, and dried sage to the mixing bowl. Mix well.
5. Place the mixing bowl, covered, in the refrigerator and completely chill the stuffing before stuffing a bird or freezing.
6. To freeze, divide the stuffing between 6 lidded plastic containers or airtight freezer bags, label, and place in the freezer for up to 12 months.
7. Defrost overnight in the refrigerator or on the defrost setting of a microwave.
